pages.text: A grassy isle, radius 7–10, with a flat-ish domed top and a rocky underside. Coal is common in its core; iron a little rarer.
$(bold)Where it lands matters$()$(br)$(li)Forest: oak and birch.$(li)Savanna: acacia.$(li)Plains: open grass, the odd tree.$(li)Desert / badlands: dirt instead of grass, dusted with sand.
